case_title: STEPHEN PAUL NAGHDI VS. REPUBLIC OF POLAND

docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCE. NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-22-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
